dialogueChunks.intro: The investigation into the {quest_focus} has uncovered layers of deception. Every lead points to another misdirection planted near {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Whoever is behind the {quest_threat} has been thorough. They've left false evidence implicating {target_npc}, who may be innocent. {quest_ally} says the real conspirator knows the {enemy_type} movements too well: they've been coordinating for months.
dialogueChunks.outro: Cut through the misdirection. Search the area near {location_hint} for the evidence they couldn't fake. The {quest_stakes} won't survive much more of this uncertainty.

dialogueChunks.intro: Your investigation is making someone nervous. The {enemy_type} launched a targeted strike near {location_hint}: aimed directly at the evidence you were tracking for the {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} reacting to your progress. The conspirator warned their allies, and the {enemy_type} moved to destroy the proof. {quest_ally} says there may still be evidence at a secondary site near {location_hint}, but time is short.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get there before they can destroy everything. Fight through whatever they've left guarding the site and recover what remains.

dialogueChunks.intro: The evidence from the {quest_focus} points to someone no one wants to believe. A person deeply trusted by the settlement stands accused, and the proof is damning.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} insists on their innocence, but {quest_ally} found correspondence near {location_hint} that connects them to the {quest_threat}. We need final proof: something that confirms guilt or clears their name beyond doubt. The {enemy_type} are watching our confusion closely.
dialogueChunks.outro: Find the decisive evidence near {location_hint}. Whether it condemns or exonerates, the {quest_stakes} cannot wait any longer for closure.
